revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十八]][[zh:四月十八]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 18|qq=April 18}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kaiping|ja|開平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaiping|1=Q11065780|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11065780}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|907|en|907|qid=Q24163|lt=907|1=907}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}} ) – {{ill|Zhu Wen|en|Zhu Wen|qid=Q1275305|lt=Zhu Quanzhong|1=Zhu Wen}} deposes {{ill|Emperor Ai of Tang|en|Emperor Ai of Tang|qid=Q9892|lt=Emperor Ai of Tang|1=Emperor Ai of Tang}} and declares himself emperor. The next day, he establishes the {{ill|Later Liang (Five Dynasties)|en|Later Liang (Five Dynasties)|qid=Q783489|lt=Later Liang (Five Dynasties)|1=Later Liang (Five Dynasties)}} , marking the beginning of the {{ill|Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms period|en|Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms period|qid=Q242115|lt=Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms period|1=Five Dynasties and Ten Kingdoms period}} . == Births == * {{ill|Genki (Japan)|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1571|en|1571|qid=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|qid=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}} ) – {{ill|Niwa Nagashige|en|Niwa Nagashige|qid=Q909763|lt=Niwa Nagashige|1=Niwa Nagashige}} , samurai of the {{ill|Azuchi–Momoyama period|en|Azuchi–Momoyama period|qid=Q319531|lt=Azuchi-Momoyama period|1=Azuchi–Momoyama period}} , and first lord of {{ill|Shirakawa Domain|en|Shirakawa Domain|qid=Q1067555|lt=Shirakawa Domain|1=Shirakawa Domain}} (+ {{ill|1637|en|1637|qid=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}} ). * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|qid=Q2624|lt=June 2|1=June 2}} ) – {{ill|Nakayama Miki|en|Nakayama Miki|qid=Q2723199|lt=Nakayama Miki|1=Nakayama Miki}} , founder of {{ill|Tenrikyo|en|Tenrikyo|qid=Q737323|lt=Tenrikyo|1=Tenrikyo}} (+ {{ill|1887|en|1887|qid=Q7826|lt=1887|1=1887}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8 (Gregorian {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} ) – {{ill|Yoshimura Toratarō|ja|吉村虎太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshimura Toratarō|1=Yoshimura Toratarō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11413307}} , {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|qid=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain|1=Tosa Domain}} -born {{ill|Shishi (Japan)|en|Shishi (Japan)|qid=Q2279517|lt=shishi (activist)|1=Shishi (Japan)}} (+ {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 2 ({{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}} ) – {{ill|Yasukawa Keiichirō|ja|安川敬一郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasukawa Keiichirō|1=Yasukawa Keiichirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11450647}} , {{ill|businessman|ja|Businessperson|1=Businessperson|2=ja|3=実業家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/businessman|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43845}} and founder of {{ill|Meiji Mining|ja|明治鉱業|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Mining|1=Meiji Mining|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11512410}} (+ {{ill|1934|en|1934|qid=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}} ). == Deaths == * ({{ill|479 BC|en|479 BC|qid=Q80679|lt=479 BC|1=479 BC}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} ) – {{ill|Confucius|en|Confucius|qid=Q4604|lt=Confucius|1=Confucius}} , founder of {{ill|Confucianism|en|Confucianism|qid=Q9581|lt=Confucianism|1=Confucianism}} (* {{ill|551 BC|en|551 BC|qid=Q243768|lt=551 BC|1=551 BC}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|qid=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}} ) – {{ill|Hokusai|en|Hokusai|qid=Q5586|lt=Katsushika Hokusai|1=Hokusai}} , {{ill|ukiyo-e|ja|浮世絵師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ukiyo-e|qq=}} artist (* {{ill|1760|en|1760|qid=Q7646|lt=1760|1=1760}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|17|4|19|3|18|5|4|0418|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
